messages.content: Hey! 😊 How's it going? Anyone got any fun plans for the weekend?
Hey Bob! I’m good, just counting down to the weekend lol. No wild plans yet, was thinking about maybe hitting up that new taco place if you’re interested? 🌮
Tacos sound awesome! I’ve actually been craving Mexican food lately. Count me in! Do you know if they have good margaritas too? 👀
Heck yes, they totally do! I saw a bunch of pics of their margaritas online and they look epic 🍹 Maybe we can try a couple different flavors?
Absolutely, I’m down for a margarita taste test! 😄 Let’s make it a mini food adventure. When were you thinking of going?
How about Saturday evening? That way we can fully embrace the food coma without worrying about work the next day 😂 Let me know if that works for you!
Saturday evening works perfectly for me! 😂 I’m ready for maximum taco and margarita consumption. Should we meet there or head over together?
Let’s head over together! I can swing by your place and we’ll go from there. What time should I pick you up?
Sounds great! Maybe around 6:30? That should give us plenty of time to get a table and scope out the menu. Let me know if you want to meet earlier!
6:30 works for me! I’ll text you when I’m on my way. Can’t wait—this is gonna be so good! 😋
Awesome, can’t wait! I’ll be ready. Hope they don’t run out of chips and salsa before we get there 😂
Haha right? I might have to pregame with some chips at home just in case 😂 See you Saturday!
Deal! If you show up with chip crumbs on your shirt, I’ll know why 😂 See you Saturday!
Lol, no promises! If I do, just pretend you didn’t see anything 😅 See ya soon!
You got it, my lips are sealed 😂 Enjoy your pregame snack! See ya Saturday!
Thanks! Hope you survive the week—taco Saturday is our reward 😂
Absolutely, counting down the days! I’ll power through knowing unlimited tacos are at the finish line 🌮😎
That’s the spirit! If you need extra motivation, just imagine the mountain of guac waiting for us 🥑
Now you’re speaking my language! I might just bring my own shovel for that guac 😂
Haha, yes! We’ll be those people with way too much guac on the table. No regrets!
Zero regrets! Honestly, if guac was a sport, we’d be champions by now 🏆🥑
100%! We should get matching guac champion shirts for next time 😂
I’m in! Next taco night, we roll up in style—guac shirts and all. It’s a lifestyle at this point 😆
For real, at this point we need a secret handshake too. Only true guac fans allowed in the club! 🥑🤝
Deal! We’ll come up with the most ridiculous handshake ever—bonus points if it involves an imaginary avocado toss 😂
Oh absolutely, it’s gotta be dramatic. We’ll practice so hard, everyone at the table will want to join our elite guac squad 😏
Honestly, I’m ready for the auditions. The Guac Squad is about to take over taco night, just watch 😂🥑
Haha, the legend of the Guac Squad begins! I hope everyone else is prepared for this level of commitment (and avocado consumption) 😆
They better be! Honestly, I feel like the only rule is “bring your best guac game or go home.” We don’t mess around 😎
I found a pearl in my oyster at dinner last week!
Exactly! And maybe a side rule: chips must be sturdy enough to survive a heavy dip. No flimsy chips allowed in the Guac Squad 😂
100%! Weak chips are the enemy of progress. I’m bringing the thickest tortilla chips I can find next time—Guac Squad approved only 😁
Love it! Honestly, we should start rating

needle_message: I found a pearl in my oyster at dinner last week!
